product.name: Master Kong Iced Black Tea
selling_points: Cool and refreshing for hot days.

creative_strategy.core_pain: Feeling overheated and thirsty on hot days, wanting a quick, satisfying cool-down.
creative_strategy.promise: A chilled sip of Master Kong Iced Black Tea delivers an instant, refreshing cool-off you can feel.

character.appearance: One young adult of any gender, medium build, light healthy skin tone, relaxed demeanor.
character.wardrobe: Light summer t-shirt in beige or pale gray, simple casual look.
character.hair_makeup: Natural hair, minimal makeup; fresh, clean appearance without shine or sweat effects.
character.performance_style: Subtle, real-life actions: small forehead wipe, calm sip, soft smile; gentle, comfortable energy.

scene.location: Small sunlit balcony or patio with a matte wooden table in front of the seated person.
scene.lighting: Bright natural afternoon sunlight with soft shadows and light rim from one side; gentle fill so the label is readable.
scene.background: Softly blurred greenery and a simple balcony rail; uncluttered, clean, summery vibe.
key_props: Bottle cap placed beside the bottle

product.visual_identity: Master Kong Iced Black Tea single-serve bottle; use the product reference for bottle shape, label, and colors; keep the label facing the viewer on the final hold.
product.proof_prop: The chilled bottle itself used for the sip action.

single_shot.visual_prompt: Locked-off camera at table height in a sunny balcony setting, medium-close framing on a matte wooden tabletop with a bottle of iced black tea front-center, the label clearly facing the viewer and the cap resting beside it. A casually dressed young adult in a light summer t-shirt sits behind the table, looking a bit warm from the sun. In one continuous, smooth motion, they reach in, pick up the bottle, bring it to their lips, and take a long, refreshing sip. After the sip, they give a small relaxed smile, then bring the bottle closer toward the camera, rotating slightly so the label stays front and centered, holding it steady for a lingering beat as sunlight glows on the bottle. Natural bright afternoon light with soft shadows and gentle background blur of greenery; steady tripod shot with a very slight slow push-in. End on a clean, label-forward product hold.
single_shot.start_key_image_prompt: A sunny balcony scene with a small matte wooden table in the foreground. The Master Kong Iced Black Tea bottle stands upright near front-center with its label facing the viewer; the cap is off and placed beside the bottle on the table. A young adult in a light beige summer t-shirt sits behind the table, relaxed, hands near the bottle, ready to reach for it. Bright natural side light creates soft shadows; background shows softly blurred greenery and a simple balcony rail. Camera is locked at table height in a medium-close composition.
single_shot.audio: Bright, upbeat summer pop instrumental; subtle cap/clink and sip SFX; a quiet satisfied “ah” after the sip.
